emails.subject: Wabash Valley...ISDA Agreement
emails.body: Wabash Valley...ISDA Agreement Tana, I keep getting calls from a lady named Kathy at ACES (who is agent for Wabash) looking for a draft of the ISDA Agreement. She gave me another contact for Wabash Jill Hoerger at (317) 481-2851. Kim Theriot

emails.subject: Wabash Valley...ISDA Agreement

emails.subject: Re: Wabash Valley...ISDA Agreement
emails.body: Re: Wabash Valley...ISDA Agreement We will try to get back to them soon. We had to locate Indiana counsel to advise us on this, and hope to engage them today. Kim S Theriot 10/12/2000 09:34 AM
